category_sources: Official homepage describes GAUL as a programming library for genetic/evolutionary algorithms.
source_facts.description says Genetic Algorithm Utility Library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gaul; official homepage expands it as Genetic Algorithm Utility Library, or GAUL.
docs_sources: Official GAUL documentation page catalogs reference guides, tutorials, FAQs, and platform notes.
Official reference guide is linked from the GAUL documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage lists SourceForge as the development home, and the SourceForge project page is the official project/code host.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes evolutionary algorithms, optimization algorithms, and portable C code.
source_facts.description identifies a genetic algorithm utility library.
